[Sheet: README_Formulas]
Field,Definition
MaturityBucket,"Residual tenor bucket label for exposure (0-6m, 6-12m, 12-24m, >24m)."
BucketMidpointMonths,"Numeric midpoint in months used as weight proxy for each bucket (3, 9, 18, 36)."
RWA_Bucket_Millions,Portion of Total RWA allocated to this bucket. Sums to entity/date RWA across buckets.
WeightedResidualMaturity_Months,Sum(RWA_bucket * midpoint) / Sum(RWA_bucket) for the group.
MaturityIndex_1to5,Linear scaling of WeightedResidualMaturity over 0–36 months to a 1–5 index (clamped).

[Sheet: README_Formulas]
Field,Definition
MaturityBucket,"Residual tenor bucket label for exposure (0-6m, 6-12m, 12-24m, >24m)."
BucketMidpointMonths,"Numeric midpoint in months used as weight proxy for each bucket (3, 9, 18, 36)."
RWA_Bucket_Millions,Portion of Total RWA allocated to this bucket. Sums to entity/date RWA across buckets.
WeightedResidualMaturity_Months,Sum(RWA_bucket * midpoint) / Sum(RWA_bucket) for the group.
MaturityIndex_1to5,Linear scaling of WeightedResidualMaturity over 0–36 months to a 1–5 index (clamped).

AML/CFT KPI DOCUMENT 1: KYC & CUSTOMER DUE DILIGENCE
Module Overview
Customer  Due  Diligence  (CDD)  and  Know  Your  Customer  (KYC)  are  essential  components  of  AML/CFT
frameworks. They ensure that institutions accurately identify and verify the identities of their clients, assess
risk, and monitor ongoing relationships.

financing. Effective KPIs help ensure system efficiency, data quality, and timely alert handling.

[Sheet: README_Formulas]
Field,Definition
MaturityBucket,"Residual tenor bucket label for exposure (0-6m, 6-12m, 12-24m, >24m)."
BucketMidpointMonths,"Numeric midpoint in months used as weight proxy for each bucket (3, 9, 18, 36)."
RWA_Bucket_Millions,Portion of Total RWA allocated to this bucket. Sums to entity/date RWA across buckets.
WeightedResidualMaturity_Months,Sum(RWA_bucket * midpoint) / Sum(RWA_bucket) for the group.
MaturityIndex_1to5,Linear scaling of WeightedResidualMaturity over 0–36 months to a 1–5 index (clamped).

AML/CFT KPI DOCUMENT 1: KYC & CUSTOMER DUE DILIGENCE
Module Overview
Customer  Due  Diligence  (CDD)  and  Know  Your  Customer  (KYC)  are  essential  components  of  AML/CFT
frameworks. They ensure that institutions accurately identify and verify the identities of their clients, assess
risk, and monitor ongoing relationships.

[Sheet: README_Formulas]
Field,Definition
MaturityBucket,"Residual tenor bucket label for exposure (0-6m, 6-12m, 12-24m, >24m)."
BucketMidpointMonths,"Numeric midpoint in months used as weight proxy for each bucket (3, 9, 18, 36)."
RWA_Bucket_Millions,Portion of Total RWA allocated to this bucket. Sums to entity/date RWA across buckets.
WeightedResidualMaturity_Months,Sum(RWA_bucket * midpoint) / Sum(RWA_bucket) for the group.
MaturityIndex_1to5,Linear scaling of WeightedResidualMaturity over 0–36 months to a 1–5 index (clamped).
